# `api.lookup.get_access_keys`

> `GET /lookup/accessKeys` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.lookup.get_access_keys() -> list[AccessKey]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab lookup get_access_keys
```

GET /lookup/accessKeys

## Response

Returns a list of `List[AccessKey]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `accessKey` | `Optional[str]` | no | Access key string |
| `friendlyName` | `Optional[str]` | no | Friendly display name |
